Row.Text: Along the coast, merchant ships flitter to and fro, carrying pottery and olive oil. On the shore, spearmen stand guard atop walls sized for giants. And from within the city's stone armor, palace tombs overflow with gold. Don the boar tusk helm and wield your spear, Wanax of Ahhiyawa- these are your people. Your greatness today will weave the legends of tomorrow.
Brace yourself. Earthshaker Poseidon favors the people of the boar tusk helm.
Mycenae wants to turn its Towns into Cities by first showering them with Food from their Wanax Palace Unique Quarter. Build lots of Cities and build a Wanax Palace in each one.
